title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 33
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a school canteen.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to eat at the school canteen? The queue is moving quickly now. || Woman: I nearly chose the burger, and I also looked at the chips. || Man: They both look fine to me. || Woman: Maybe, but I want something hot but not fried today. [1]I am going to have the omelette[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Man: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to eat at the school canteen? The queue is moving quickly now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I nearly chose the burger, and I also looked at the chips.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: They both look fine to me.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe, but I want something hot but not fried today. I am going to have the omelette. It should be enough before we leave.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost glasses.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Did you find your glasses? You looked everywhere this morning. || Boy: Not at first. I went back to the library, because I remembered reading after lunch there. || Girl: What about the school bus? You were there later. || Boy: I checked, but it was not there. Then my club leader called and said [1]my glasses was on the table in the drama room[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Girl: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Boy: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you find your glasses? You looked everywhere this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not at first. I went back to the library, because I remembered reading after lunch there.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What about the school bus? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but it was not there. Then my club leader called and said my glasses was on the table in the drama room. I must have left it there before school.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying something for the school trip.
questions.audio_script: Man: I need to buy something for the school trip, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a small bag. || Boy: That might be nice. What about a new camera? || Man: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a rain cover because my old bag already has one broken zip[/1]. || Boy: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Man: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I need to buy something for the school trip, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a small bag.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That might be nice. What about a new camera?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, I chose a rain cover because my old bag already has one broken zip.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job are you doing at the sports centre this afternoon? I thought you had to check tickets. || Woman: I did last week, but the machine does that now. || Man: Are you going to clean the pool area then? || Woman: No, because it is closed until evening. The manager just told me that [1]I need to give out towels at reception[/1]. || Man: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Woman: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What job do you have to do at home before visitors arrive? I thought you were going to vacuum the stairs. || Girl: No, the vacuum cleaner is upstairs. || Woman: Then are you going to make the beds? || Girl: Not today, because they are already done. Mum said [1]my job is to set the table[/1]. || Woman: That should not take too long. || Girl: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are we still playing tennis after school? I brought everything for it. || Girl: I don't think so. The courts are wet, so it will not work today. || Boy: We could try the shopping centre instead. || Girl: I thought about that, but we went there yesterday. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are going to a board game café this afternoon instead[/1]. || Boy: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Girl: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the school choir.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the school choir today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the music room, but the piano is being repaired. Others may wait near the main hall, although there is a parents' meeting. [1]Everyone should go straight to the drama studio after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the school choir today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the music room, but the piano is being repaired. Others may wait near the main hall, although there is a parents' meeting. Everyone should go straight to the drama studio after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.
